title: PirtmProof
description: Schema for a PIRTM transpile-time proof packet stored in the !pirtm_proof binary section. PM-2460 / ADR-073.

proof.description: 0x-prefixed SHA-256 hex digest binding prime_index to tensor body

primeIndex.description: CRT prime index identifying the module's residue class

epsilon.description: Contraction factor ε — must be in (0, 1)

opNormT.description: Operator norm of the transition tensor T; op_norm_T * epsilon must be < 1

proofHash.description: SHA-256 hex of (prime_index|epsilon|op_norm_T) — proof-of-binding, 64 hex chars

publicSignals.description: Arbitrary key-value public signals emitted alongside the proof

then.description: Contractivity invariant: op_norm_T * epsilon < 1 (enforced in code, documented here)
